purpose: Root layout: Inter font, dark theme, metadata, GlobalProvider wrapper
Tailwind directives + CSS custom properties + animations
Landing page — Decide/Learn surface: hero, features, pricing, FAQ, social proof, CTA
Dashboard layout: sidebar nav + topbar + main content area. Wraps all dashboard pages with StoreProvider.
Dashboard home — Monitor surface: computed stat cards, charts from real data, recent activity feed
SLA policies CRUD list — Operate surface: data table, create/edit/delete, search, sort, filter
Incidents CRUD list — Operate surface: data table, create/edit/delete, bulk actions, search, sort, filter
Incident detail — Operate surface: view/edit form, status transitions with validation, activity log
Settings — Configure surface: profile form, notification toggles, data export/import/reset
React Context + useReducer global state: all entity CRUD, seed data, localStorage sync, toast notifications
TypeScript interfaces for SLAPolicy, Incident, UserProfile, AppState, Toast
Utilities: generateId, formatDate, formatNumber, classNames, exportToJSON, importFromJSON
